title: T-039 — Matrix CSV Import Modal (matrix_import_modal) — 3-stage state machine
prompt:
# T-039 — Matrix CSV Import Modal

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §17.1 PLE-012, V-CM-01..04
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:414-470 (`matrix_import_modal`)
UX: design/07-PLANNING-EXT-UX.md:625-635
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement 3-stage modal (upload → validate → preview) for CSV import with drag-drop zone, server-side validation, color-coded diff preview; [Apply Import] writes to changeover_matrix_drafts (T-009).

## Implementation contract
1. New `apps/web/src/components/matrix/MatrixImportModal.tsx` (shadcn Dialog) with state: 'upload'|'validate'|'preview'.
2. Drag-drop zone (also [Choose File] button); accepts .csv/.txt; ≤5 MB; ≤10 000 rows.
3. New endpoint route `apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/changeover-matrix/import/route.ts`: parses CSV (Papa.parse), validates V-CM-01..04, returns MatrixDiff[] + errors[].
4. [Apply Import] writes preview rows to changeover_matrix_drafts.status='preview'; user must follow up with [Save & Publish] (T-038).

## Files
- apps/web/src/components/matrix/MatrixImportModal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/app/api/scheduler/changeover-matrix/import/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/components/matrix/__tests__/MatrixImportModal.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a 50-row CSV with 2 V-CM-02 (negative minutes) errors, when import API is called, then response returns valid: 48, errors: [{row:5,...}, {row:23,...}]
2. Given the rendered modal, when compared to prototype design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/modals.jsx:414-470, then it has same 3 stages, same drag-drop zone, same diff preview table, and same shadcn primitives (Dialog, Card, Table, Button, Alert) — parity by RTL snapshot + checklist
3. Given Planner attempts to import row with segregation_required=true, when validate runs, then V-CM-04 error returned (Planner cannot set segregation via import)

## Test strategy
- RED: write __tests__/MatrixImportModal.test.tsx covering 3-stage transitions + parity + V-CM-04
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test matrix/MatrixImportModal'

## Risk red lines
- Do not auto-publish drafts (must require [Save & Publish])
- Do not bypass V-CM-01..04 validators on server
- Do not exceed 5MB / 10k row limits

pipeline_inputs.description: 3-stage CSV import (upload → validate → preview) with drag-drop, server validation V-CM-01..04, draft-row writes.
pipeline_inputs.details: Server-side CSV parser via Papa.parse stream. Streaming progress via SSE if >1000 rows. [Apply Import] writes to changeover_matrix_drafts (preview state). User publishes via T-038.
out_of_scope: Do not implement publish modal here (T-038)
Do not implement diff modal here (T-040)
